title: aegilops triuncialis f. flavescens
intro: Aegilops triuncialis f. flavescens, also known as yellow spelt, is a subspecies of the Aegilops triuncialis plant, a type of wild grass belonging to the wheat tribe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aegilops triuncialis f. flavescens include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health issues, including digestive problems and skin irritations.
